subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-20
subcodes.first_line: I remember the meetings, gatherings and churches which we attended in America... The condition of man is pure at two stages of his life
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the power of words; of speech, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
